content: Look at the memory protocol in AGENTS.md (the 'Per-task memory artifacts (REQUIRED at task end)' section). Then complete this task: write a small file at .kody/tasks/989489AA-7167-4538-A73B-19CBD84ABBB8/context.json with this task's metadata (taskId=989489AA-7167-4538-A73B-19CBD84ABBB8, taskType='chat', outcome='completed', filesTouched=[], startedAt=now, finishedAt=now). Also write .kody/tasks/989489AA-7167-4538-A73B-19CBD84ABBB8/memory-recs.json with one high-confidence recommendation about how kody tasks should write these two files at end of every task, with type='lesson', name='task-memory-protocol-bootstrap', a clear why and how_to_apply. Commit both files.

Done. Created and committed both files:
- `.kody/tasks/989489AA-7167-4538-A73B-19CBD84ABBB8/context.json` — task metadata
- `.kody/tasks/989489AA-7167-4538-A73B-19CBD84ABBB8/memory-recs.json` — one high-confidence lesson recommendation about bootstrapping the memory protocol itself
